title: bidens andicola var. cosmantha
intro: Bidens andicola var. cosmantha, also known as Bidens cosmantha, is a lesser-known variety of the Bidens plant species, native to the Andean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens andicola var. cosmantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Bidens andicola var. cosmantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
